title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at United India Insurance Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
United India Insurance Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Risk Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
